POTUS And on vaccines, were also running a risk.If Congress fails to act we wont have the supply we need this fall to ensure that shots are available for free and easy to access for all Americans.We cannot allow that to happen. Congress needs to act now.

POTUS Because of the strategy we executed over the past year on vaccinations, testing, treatments, and more, we are now in a new moment in this pandemic.That does not mean that COVID19 is over.It means that COVID19 no longer controls our lives.
